youtube-transcript.description: Primary YouTube transcript extraction. Language-aware — supports lang: 'ja' for Japanese captions, millisecond timestamps, ad stripping. Used by the flashcard-generator skill as the first attempt in the two-tool fallback strategy.

youtube.description: Fallback YouTube transcript extraction. Legacy MCP — used when youtube-transcript fails. Downloads subtitle text with timestamps.

magic.description: 21st.dev UI component builder. Used to design and refine UI components — built the Mochi landing page (index.html) with hero section, pipeline visualization, interactive demo card, filter controls, and animated stats.
